title: Scope
description: Investigation scope produced by the Scope Builder. Passed to all workers and used throughout the investigation pipeline.

incidentId.description: Unique identifier for the incident, correlating all worker outputs.

signalType.description: Trigger signal type (e.g. error_spike, latency_spike), propagated for signal-aware worker behavior.

region.description: AWS region for the investigation (e.g. eu-west-1).

incidentWindow.description: Active incident time window workers should query.

baselineWindow.description: Baseline comparison window (default: immediately preceding window of equal duration, per ADR-004).

logGroups.description: CloudWatch log group ARNs or names targeted for log retrieval.

metrics.description: CloudWatch metrics to query for both incident and baseline windows.

traceServices.description: X-Ray service names to query for trace analysis.

dependencies.description: Downstream service dependencies of the primary service.

stat.description: Statistic to retrieve (e.g. p95, Average, Sum).
